creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 156673
svn diff that fixes MASTER_SITES for audio/cd2mp3

Title says it all. :)

I find this a handy little tool. I noticed it was marked broken
due to lack of DISTFILE. I had the file, so I'll mirror it.

CHANGES:
Makefile -- fixes MASTER_SITES, takes MAINTAINER

That's it :)

Thanks!

Chris
